title: Give the deck a brief
summary: Before generating or reorganizing, write what the deck should do. Studio workflows reuse that context.

signals.title: Audience
signals.body: Who needs to understand or decide?

guardrails.title: Planning
guardrails.body: Deck plans use the saved brief and outline.

guardrails.title: Variants
guardrails.body: Generated options can respect the same intent.

guardrails.title: Checks
guardrails.body: Validation settings travel with the deck.
